caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, focusing on "Industry-Ready ML." The presenter, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, is delivering a talk that covers various aspects of scaling data pipelines for machine learning applications. The slide displayed highlights key topics such as an overview and caveats in scaling data pipelines, components of Airflow including Celery and ML models, the distinction between ML and data pipelines, and an overview of Airflow with a use case. The presenter appears to be explaining these concepts, gesturing with his hand to emphasize points, aiming to provide a comprehensive understanding of the "big picture" in industry-ready machine learning systems.
